global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings on special fares.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and energetic feel.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'DriftPass' prominently displayed at the top center, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, rendered in a lighter shade of green, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: A large, bold headline in black text that reads 'Last-minute savings', positioned centrally to grab attention.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: A smaller, yet clear text below the headline that states 'Special fares today', providing additional context.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent black button at the bottom center with the text 'Shop now' in white, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, DriftPass logo, last-minute savings.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Special fares today, DriftPass, Shop now
